author: sz-1f
description: Rendering & inline previews for HTML, MHTML, Web Archive & Evernote export (ENEX) files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: @SZ-1F
manifest.description: View and embed HTML, MHTML, and Web Archive files natively with full styling and inline preview support.
manifest.name: Embeds+

name: Embeds+

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.2.1
**Added:**
- Native read-only support for opening and embedding Evernote's `.enex` files in Obsidian.
	- Most basic formatting elements are supported, including: standard HTML elements (e.g. headers, bolded & italicised text, bullet lists, quote blocks, etc.), and some custom Evernote elements: Mermaid diagrams, TeX formulas, Evernote tasks, note tags, image attachments, web clips, callouts, etc.
	- Viewing Evernote files respects Obsidian's light/dark mode and "Readable line length" settings.
- Embeds+ is now listed on the Obsidian Community plugins repository. No more manual installations! [Link](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/embeds-plus)

**Fixed/Removed:**
- Improved embed loading speed and reliability with better cache and render handling.
- Improved safety and stability when parsing imported content, media, and source URLs.
- Removed `activeWindow` calls as per Obsidian Plugin guidelines.
- Fixed minimum Obsidian app version; the minimum required version is now 1.5.7.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.1.3
**Fixed/Removed:**
- Updated `fast-xml-parser` (from `@plist/plist`) to v5.8.0 as an override to address [Comment and CDATA Injection via Unescaped Delimiters](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6) vulnerability.
- Pinned versions for all other dependencies (including development dependencies) for consistency.

releases.author: SZ-1F
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.1.2
**Fixed/Removed:**
- Updated minimum Obsidian version to 0.16.0 due to `Workspace.openLinkText` not being supported in 0.15.0.
- Fixed missing `await` expressions:
    - Replaced `async onUnloadFile()` in `HTMLFileView.ts` with `Promise`.
    - Updated `onload()` in `Main.ts` to no longer be asynchronous.
- Improved Obsidian popout window compatibility:
    - Replaced `window` and `document` with `activeWindow` and `activeDocument`, respectively:
    - Updated `activeWindow` in `Main.ts`, `Utils.ts`, `HTMLFileView.ts`, and `HTMLEmbedRenderer.ts`.
    - Updated `activeDocument` in `HTMLSanitiser.ts` and `HTMLEmbedRenderer.ts`.

releases.author: SZ-1F
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.1.1
**Fixed/Removed:**
- Improved HTML embed and file view rendering & moved styling into `styles.css` in favour of inline styles.
- Updated fallback rendering to use `iframe.srcdoc` when blob URLs are not available.
- Fixed URL decoding edge cases in archived resources, helping embedded content resolve more reliably.
- Tightened error handling, debug logging, and Live Preview type safety.

releases.author: SZ-1F
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.1.0
**Added:**
- Added mobile support.
- Added BRAT installation instructions to the README.

**Fixed/Removed:**
- Fixed failure handling & caching for HTML rendering and sanitisation.
    - HTML embeds and file previews now fail cleanly instead of loading indefinitely.
    - Failed HTML loads are no longer stored as empty cached content.
    - Old renders can no longer clear the active timeout or overwrite a newer render state.
- Fixed archive parsing & embed rendering bugs:
    - Unresolved resource URLs and broken local references are now stripped from rendered `.mhtml` and `.webarchive` content.
    - Fixed GIF freezing so only embedded `data:` URL GIFs are now processed, while blocked canvas exports no longer interrupt sanitisation.
    - Removed residual archive references that could trigger invalid resource loads inside rendered archives.
    - Removed `autofocus` from rendered web archive content to avoid sandbox focus warnings.

releases.author: SZ-1F
releases.description:
# Embeds+ Release v1.0.0
- Initial release.
- Adds parsing & rendering for `.html`, `.mhtml`, and `.webarchive` files.
